# 推理文本在对话界面的显示 (2026-03-11 15:43Z)

_**User**_

若有推理文本也应该解析推理文本显示在对话界面上（流式）。

---

_**Agent (model claude-4.6-sonnet-medium-thinking, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to parse and display reasoning text (thinking/reasoning content) in the chat interface with streaming support. Let me explore the codebase to understand the current structure and how the chat interface works.</details></think>
